name: Alarak
description: A combo Assassin that can move enemies around and punish mistakes.
title: Highlord of the Tal'darim
info: Not all heroes are born of altruism... some, like Alarak, simply desire vengeance. As the new Highlord of the Tal'darim, Alarak leads his people to a destiny free of the corrupt influence of the fallen xel'naga, Amon.

Alarak.name: Discord Strike
Alarak.description: After a 0.5 second delay, enemies in front of Alarak take 165 (+4% per level) damage and are silenced for 1.5 seconds.

Alarak.name: Telekinesis
Alarak.description: Vector Targeting Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals 48 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.

Alarak.name: Lightning Surge
Alarak.description: Deal 62 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 (+4% per level) health for each Hero hit.

Alarak.name: Deadly Charge
Alarak.description: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Alarak.name: Counter-Strike
Alarak.description: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.

Alarak.name: Sadism
Alarak.description: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

1.name: Overwhelming Power
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.

1.name: Ruthless Momentum
1.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.

1.name: Extended Lightning
1.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.

4.name: Chaos Reigns
4.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.

4.name: Negatively Charged
4.description: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.

4.name: Show of Force
4.description: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 (+4% per level) damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.  Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.

7.name: Dissonance
7.description: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.

7.name: Hindered Motion
7.description: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.

7.name: Applied Force
7.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% further and has 15% increased range.

10.name: Deadly Charge
10.description: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

10.name: Counter-Strike
10.description: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.

13.name: Blade of the Highlord
13.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.

13.name: Pure Malice
13.description: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.

13.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
13.description: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

16.name: Lethal Onslaught
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.

16.name: Lightning Barrage
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.

16.name: Mocking Strikes
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.

20.name: Wrath of the Highlord
20.description: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds.  If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.

20.name: Might of the Highlord
20.description: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

20.name: Last Laugh
20.description: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.

20.name: Hasty Bargain
20.description: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

tooltipMarkup.AlarakAppliedForce: Reduce Sadism by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>, but Telekinesis pushes <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> further and has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,AlarakAppliedForce,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value/Abil,AlarakTelekinesis,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> increased range.

If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakLastLaughHeroCasterMarker,MaxStackCount"/></c> times with Basic Abilities within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakLastLaughHeroCasterMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>.

Restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakLightningSurgeHeroDamageCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> health for each Hero hit.

tooltipMarkup.AlarakNegativelyCharged: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to %.Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by %.

These effects last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakOverwhelmingPowerDiscordStrikeBuffBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.

tooltipMarkup.AlarakRiteofRakShir: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakSadismRiteofRakShirTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakSadismRiteofRakShirTalentResetPlayerCooldown,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
tooltipMarkup.AlarakRuthlessMomentum: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,AlarakTelekinesis,Cost.Vital[Energy]"Player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(-Abil,AlarakTelekinesis,Cost.Vital[Energy]-Talent,AlarakRuthlessMomentum,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"Player="0"/>.</c> Telekinesis's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,AlarakRuthlessMomentumModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,AlarakRuthlessMomentumCarry,Period"/>%</c> faster while above <c val="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.AlarakSadism: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by % against enemy Heroes.Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by %, up to %. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
tooltipMarkup.AlarakShowofForce: Heroes hit with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakSadismShowofForceTalentStack,MaxStackCount+1"/></c> of Alarak's Abilities within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakSadismShowofForceTalentStack,Duration"/></c> seconds take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakSadismShowofForceTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and increase Sadism by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakSadismAdd2TokensShowOfForceTalent,Value"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakSadismAdd2TokensShowOfForceTalent,Value*Behavior,AlarakShowofForceSadismTalentStack,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>. <n/><n/>Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.
tooltipMarkup.AlarakTelekinesis: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c></n>Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,AlarakTelekinesisDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies.
tooltipMarkup.AlarakWrathOfTheHighlord: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,AlarakWrathoftheHighlordSadismAccumulator,Scale*10000"/>%</c> of Sadism's bonus damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,AlarakWrathoftheHighlordTargetVulnerability,Duration" /></c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,AlarakWrathOfTheHighlordCounterStrikeCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="1" /></c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.
